description: Literary account in Judaeo-Arabic of the episode of the Toledo Qaraites who arrived in Cairo in 1465 CE. There are at least three other versions, for which see Marina Rustow, "Karaites Real and Imagined: Three Cases of Jewish Heresy," pp. 49f.
description_he: טקסט ספרותי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
